# `polars math log1p` for [dataframe](/commands/categories/dataframe.md)

<div class='command-title'>Compute the element-wise natural log of 1 + x for a column expression.</div>

## Signature

```> polars math log1p {flags} ```


## Input/output types:

| input             | output            |
| ----------------- | ----------------- |
| polars_expression | polars_expression |
| polars_selector   | polars_expression |
## Examples

Compute the element-wise natural log of 1 + x for a column
```nu
> [[a]; [0] [1] [2]] |
    polars into-df |
    polars select (polars col a | polars math log1p) |
    polars collect

```
